description_long: This is a bust sculpture of a human figure, mounted on a tall, rectangular pedestal made of stone or concrete. The bust depicts a male figure with detailed facial features and hair, rendered in a darker material than the pedestal. The pedestal is set on a square, tiled platform that is slightly elevated above the surrounding ground, which is covered with grass. The front of the pedestal features an inscription, likely indicating the name and dates associated with the figure. The overall structure is robust and solid, with clean lines and a formal, commemorative appearance. The sculpture is situated outdoors, as evidenced by the grass and natural lighting.
description: A commemorative bust of a man on a tall stone pedestal, set on a square tiled platform with an inscription on the front. The sculpture is outdoors, surrounded by grass.
description_view_0: Side view showing the profile of the bust and the tall, rectangular pedestal on a tiled platform.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the back of the bust and pedestal, with the tiled platform and grass visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile of the bust and pedestal, with the platform and some shadow detail.
description_view_3: Frontal view highlighting the face of the bust and the inscription on the pedestal, with the platform and grass in front.
attribute_subject_matter: bust of a human male figure
attribute_location_context: outdoor paved area surrounded by grass, likely in a park or public square
